turns.assistantContent: The test creates a minimal session file without `counters` or `turns` fields. The `incrementCounter` call crashes because `session.counters` is undefined. I need to handle this gracefully — initialize missing fields when the session exists but is incomplete.

data.text: The test creates a minimal session file without `counters` or `turns` fields. The `incrementCounter` call crashes because `session.counters` is undefined. I need to handle this gracefully — initialize missing fields when the session exists but is incomplete.
